docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACZ, JULIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MIRNA $1,347.08 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,399.08, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1797.08 BUT ATTRIBUTES 25% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE FOREGOING JUDGMENT IS A NET WARD/ STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MIRNA
